---
title: "CV"
---

[Download PDF](cv.pdf){.btn .btn-primary}

::: {.callout-note}
Drop your `cv.pdf` in the site root and the download button above will pick it up. The HTML summary below is just a quick mirror — keep the PDF authoritative.
:::

## Education

**M.S. Mathematics**, University of Wisconsin–Madison · *September 2024 - May 2026*

**B.S. Mathematics (Honors) & Physics**, UC Berkeley · *August 2019 - December 2023*

## Selected experience

*(Fill this in.)*

## Selected projects
- **Poker simulators** — 
- **Market Making simulation** — 
- **Nebula** — semantic movie recommender with contrastive fine-tuning; +80.6% NDCG@10. [Details](projects/nebula.qmd).
- **NGordnet** — Spring Boot + PostgreSQL service over the 176M-row Google Books Ngram corpus. [Details](projects/ngordnet.qmd).
- **wsh** — POSIX-ish shell in C: REPL, pipelines, builtins, `fork`/`exec`/`dup2`.

## Awards

- **Jane Street Estimathon** — winning team.
- **UC Berkeley Math** — Departmental Honors

## Skills

Python, C, Java, JavaScript/TypeScript, React, SQL, PyTorch, FastAPI, Spring Boot, Docker, Linux systems programming.
